findings.message: New Prometheus scrape job 'redis' has no corresponding alert rule defined in the alerts directory
findings.suggestion: Add a redis alert rule file (e.g., infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/redis_alerts.yml) with appropriate health checks, similar to postgres_alerts.yml

findings.message: New Prometheus scrape job 'redis' has no corresponding Grafana dashboard defined
findings.suggestion: Create a redis dashboard at infra/observability/grafana/dashboards/redis.json to visualize metrics from this job, similar to postgres.json

findings.message: Scrape target 'redis-exporter:9121' is referenced but the redis-exporter service is not defined in any Docker Compose file
findings.suggestion: Add a redis-exporter service definition to infra/compose/observability.yml, similar to the postgres-exporter service (lines 84-92), to ensure the exporter container is running and accessible
